<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-hâi]][[de:Holz-Schwein]][[fr:Cochon de bois]][[hak:Yet-hoi]][[ja:乙亥]][[ko:을해]][[nds:Holt-Swien]][[vi:Ất Hợi]][[za:Iethaih]][[zh-min-nan:It-hāi]][[zh-yue:乙亥]][[zh:乙亥]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-hâi]][[de:Holz-Schwein]][[fr:Cochon de bois]][[hak:Yet-hoi]][[ja:乙亥]][[ko:을해]][[nds:Holt-Swien]][[vi:Ất Hợi]][[za:Iethaih]][[zh-min-nan:It-hāi]][[zh-yue:乙亥]][[zh:乙亥]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-hâi]][[de:Holz-Schwein]][[fr:Cochon de bois]][[hak:Yet-hoi]][[ja:乙亥]][[ko:을해]][[nds:Holt-Swien]][[vi:Ất Hợi]][[za:Iethaih]][[zh-min-nan:It-hāi]][[zh-yue:乙亥]][[zh:乙亥]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Pig|kanji=乙亥|romaji=kinoto i|onyomi=otsugai|p=yǐhài|w=i-hai|mi=i²¹ xaɪ̯⁵³|y=jyut6 hoi6|j=jyut6 hoi6|ci=jyt̚ hɐi²|mc=ʔit ɣəiH|oc-bs=Ɂik ɢˤəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as 乙亥''' (kinotoi (乙亥), otsubokunoinoshishi (乙亥), itsugai (乙亥)) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 12th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yang Wood Dog|Jikotsu]] and followed by [[Yang Fire Rat|Besshi]]. In the framework of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin Yang Five Elements]], the element represented by the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Kinoto (乙)]] signifies yin [[Wood (wuxing)|Wood (木)]], while the element represented by the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Pig (zodiac)|Pig (亥)]] signifies yin [[Water (wuxing)|Water (水)]], establishing a generating relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Mutual Generation]], i.e. Water generates Wood).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Wood Pig (乙亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: ikki
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulhae (을해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Hợi

<!--
==
* Yin Wood Pig (乙亥) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: きのとい (kinoto-i)
***Onyomi: おつぼくのいのしし (otsuboku-no-inoshishi)
***Onyomi: いつがい (itsugai)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulhae
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Hợi

-->
==Years of Yin Wood Pig==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 15 when divided by 60 is a year of Etsugai ([[Year|year]]).
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Etsugai (乙亥の年)'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 15|15 AD]]
* [[AD 75|75 AD]]
* [[AD 135|135 AD]]
* [[195|195 AD]]
* [[255|255 AD]]
* [[315|315 AD]]
* [[375|375 AD]]
* [[435|435 AD]]
* [[495|495 AD]]
* [[555|555 AD]]
* [[615|615 AD]]
* [[675|675 AD]]
* [[735|735 AD]]
* [[795|795 AD]]
* [[855|855 AD]]
* [[915|915 AD]]
* [[975|975 AD]]
|
* [[1035|1035 AD]]
* [[1095|1095 AD]]
* [[1155|1155 AD]]
* [[1215|1215 AD]]
* [[1275|1275 AD]]
* [[1335|1335 AD]]
* [[1395|1395 AD]]
* [[1455|1455 AD]]
* [[1515|1515 AD]]
* [[1575|1575 AD]]
* [[1635|1635 AD]]
* [[1695|1695 AD]]
* [[1755|1755 AD]]
* [[1815|1815 AD]]
* [[1875|1875 AD]]
* [[1935|1935 AD]]
* [[1995|1995 AD]]
|
* [[2055 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2115 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2175 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2235 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2295 AD]]
* [[2355 AD]]
* [[2415 AD]]
* [[2475 AD]]
* [[2535 AD]]
* [[2595 AD]]
* [[2655 AD]]
* [[2715 AD]]
* [[2775 AD]]
* [[2835 AD]]
* [[2895 AD]]
* [[2955 AD]]
|}

==Months of Yin Wood Pig==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems [[Kinoe (甲)]] or [[Tsuchinoto (己)]]), the month of [[October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the seasonal month (from [[Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Wood Pig==
The [[Senjitsu]] for Etsugai is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
Etsugai day is the 6th day of the [[Tsuchi (Japanese term)|Hando]] period.

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Īt-chik]]
[[zh-yue:乙亥]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Wood Pig|qq=ja|乙亥|qq=Yin Wood Pig|version=99467301|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Holt-Varkvi]]
[[de:Yin Wood Pig]]

[[ja:乙亥]]

[[zh:乙亥]]
[[ko:을해]]
[[fr:Cochon de bois]]
[[de:Holz-Schwein]]

[[af:Houtvark (astrologie)]]
[[de:Holz-Schweineen]]
[[en:Wood Pig]]
[[fr:Cochon de boisboishak]]
[[it:Yit-chṳ́id]]

[[vi:Ất Hợi]]
[[za:Yitceij]]
[[ar:Yin Wood Pig]]

<!--Yin Wood Pig--><!--Yin Wood Pig-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Ĭk-hâi]]
[[hak:Yet-hoi]]
[[nds:Holt-Swien]]
[[za:Iethaih]]
[[zh-min-nan:It-hāi]]
[[zh-yue:乙亥]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Ĭk-hâi]]
[[hak:Yet-hoi]]
[[nds:Holt-Swien]]
[[za:Iethaih]]
[[zh-min-nan:It-hāi]]
[[zh-yue:乙亥]]
{{wikidata link|Q1062067}}
[[Category: ]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
